attacking_style: Exploits transitional terrain, particularly descents between climbs, to bridge from favorites group to breakaways. Opportunistic rather than sustained power-based attacks.
team_tactics: AG2R utilizes cooperative breakaway strategies with teammates (e.g., Hannan) to maximize stage placement while managing his limitations through numerical advantage in moves.
terrain_preference: Descents and transitional sections between climbs where positioning and timing matter more than pure climbing power. Less suited to pure summit finishes.
vulnerability: Limited capabilities on sustained climbs suggest he requires tactical positioning and teamwork rather than individual firepower to compete for results.
key_patterns: Bridges from peloton/favorites to breakaways on descents rather than initiating attacks (2 instances)
AG2R deploys breakaway-focused team tactics recognizing his profile limitations (2 instances)
Targets transitional terrain windows between major obstacles for positioning moves (2 instances)
form_trajectory: neutral: 2023 UAE Tour showed consistent tactical execution with fourth place, but gap between observations too large for trajectory assessment
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 9
